title: 1.1: Creates `Dialer.IOSamples` method in `lib/netext/dialer.go` with signature `(sampleTime time.Time, ctm metrics.TagsAndMeta, builtinMetrics *metrics.BuiltinMetrics) metrics.SampleContainer`
1.2: Scopes `Dialer.IOSamples` in `lib/netext/dialer.go` to emitting only both IO samples (data_sent, data_received)
1.4: Removes all 3 methods associated with `NetTrail` (GetSamples, GetTags, GetTime) from `lib/netext/dialer.go`
1.5: Removes the `metrics.ConnectedSampleContainer` interface compliance check for `NetTrail` from `lib/netext/dialer.go`
1.6: Adds iteration metric emission logic in `js/runner.go` that emits both iteration samples (iteration_duration, iterations)
1.7: Guards iteration metric emission in `js/runner.go` behind both conditions (isFullIteration, isDefault)
1.8: Updates `js/runner.go` to call `Dialer.IOSamples` for network metric emission
2.1: Removes or updates the TODO comment referencing the GitHub discussion in `lib/netext/dialer.go`
2.2: Includes a godoc comment on the `Dialer.IOSamples` method in `lib/netext/dialer.go`
4.1: Modifies or removes any of the 2 atomic byte tracking operations (atomic.SwapInt64 for BytesWritten, atomic.SwapInt64 for BytesRead) in the Dialer
